basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 131 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Kalyani, West Bengal
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Kalyani (West Bengal) has published the notification for engagement of Senior Resident (Non-Academic) on tenure basis on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 131 vacancies across 30 departments. The interview will be conducted in Hybrid mode (Online & Offline) from 26.05.2026 and 28.05.2026 to 29.05.2026. Eligible candidates with MD/MS/DNB/MDS qualifications can apply online through the given Google form link up to 15.05.2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on the date of publishing of notification. | Age Relaxation: | SC/ST: 5 years OBC: 3 years PwD (OPH): 10 years | AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee | Payment Mode: Through NEFT in favour of “AIIMS KALYANI INTERNAL RESOURCES ACCOUNT”

qualification.details: Essential Qualification | Medical Candidates: Post Graduation Medical Degree (MD/MS/DNB) or Equivalent in respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute. Dentistry: MDS in respective / any speciality of Dentistry. Hospital Administration: MD/DNB in Hospital Administration. Senior Demonstrator (Non-Medical): M.Sc./M.Biotech/M.Stat + PhD in concerned subject (Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry & Biostatistics).

selection_process: Personal Interview (Hybrid Mode - Online & Offline) Merit list prepared on the basis of performance in interview Document verification
how_to_apply: Fill the online application through the Google Form link: https://forms.gle/vy6bLywRaSDjrYpz5
Keep scanned copies of all certificates, photo, signature, and payment receipt ready.
Submit the form on or before 15.05.2026 (05:00 PM).
Appear for the Hybrid Interview as per schedule with all original documents.
important_instructions: No hard copy of application will be accepted. Candidates already in service must produce NOC at the time of interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. The post is whole time and private practice is not allowed. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is 15 May 2026 up to 05:00 PM. Candidates interested in applying for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts must complete the Google Form submission process before the deadline to avoid rejection of their applications.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Kalyani has announced a total of 131 vacancies for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts across 30 different departments. The vacancies are distributed among UR, OBC, SC, ST, and EWS categories according to Government of India reservation rules.

faq.question: Q3. Which departments have vacancies under AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in departments such as Anaesthesia, Cardiology, CTVS, Emergency Medicine, Endocrinology, Nephrology, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Pediatrics, Radio Diagnosis, Surgical Oncology, Urology, Dentistry, Anatomy, Pharmacology, and several other clinical and non-clinical specialties. Candidates should carefully check department-wise vacancy details before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Medical candidates must possess MD, MS, DNB, or equivalent postgraduate qualifications in the relevant specialty from recognized institutions. Dentistry applicants should hold MDS qualification, while Hospital Administration candidates require MD/DNB in Hospital Administration. Certain non-medical posts require M.Sc./M.Biotech/M.Stat along with PhD in the concerned subject.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years as on the date of publication of the notification. Age relaxation benefits are applicable for reserved category candidates including SC, ST, OBC, and PwD applicants according to Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to UR, OBC, and EWS categories are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1,000/- through NEFT in favor of “AIIMS KALYANI INTERNAL RESOURCES ACCOUNT”. SC and ST category candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on Personal Interview conducted in Hybrid Mode, which includes both online and offline interview options. Final merit list preparation will depend on candidate performance during the interview followed by document verification conducted by AIIMS Kalyani authorities.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to fill the online application form through the official Google Form link provided in the notification. Applicants should keep scanned copies of certificates, photograph, signature, and fee payment receipt ready before submitting the online form.

faq.question: Q9. Is AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident post permanent in nature?
faq.answer: No, the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts are offered purely on tenure basis under the Central Residency Scheme. The maximum tenure period is three years, and the engagement does not provide any guarantee of permanent appointment in AIIMS Kalyani.

faq.question: Q10. What important instructions should candidates remember before attending the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents during the interview and document verification process. Applicants already employed in Government or other organizations should produce a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC). No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview, and private practice is strictly prohibited during the tenure period.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for AIIMS Kalyani Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is 15 May 2026 up to 05:00 PM.
